hungry.heading: Am I hungry?
hungry.prompt: Am I feeling physical sensations of hunger or low blood sugar?
notes: Is my stomach empty and grumbling?
Am I unfocused or tired, with a headache?
Am I having an all-out reactive hypoglycemia eposide?

bored_or_anxious.heading: Are my emotions leading now?
bored_or_anxious.prompt: Am I feeling bored? Frustrated? Anxious? Rebellious?
notes: Am I looking to soothe with food or eat for entertainment?
Am I home alone and looking to sneak in a treat while Olsi isn't looking?

had_snacks_with_meal.heading: Did I have a sweets with my last meal?
had_snacks_with_meal.prompt: Did I take Kerri's advice to have sweets or other pleasure foods with a meal?
notes: With reactive hypoglycemia, I need to take blood sugar fluctuations seriously.
I can have sweets, and I also need to take care to keep my blood sugar level steady.

had_snacks_today.heading: Have I been snacking?
had_snacks_today.prompt: Have I already had snacks between now and my last meal?
notes: Yes, it is triggering to reintroduce restriction after leaving the insane diet mentality.
How do I balance the compassion for what my body's been through with the discipline to let it thrive now?

before_sleep.heading: Is it late?
before_sleep.prompt: Am I going to sleep in less than 4 hours?
notes: I have reflux. Do I choose the pills or lifestyle changes?
How do I balance care for my throat and esophagus with reacting to dieting trauma?

time_since_last_food.heading: Have I eaten?
time_since_last_food.prompt: Did I eat less than 3 hours ago?
notes: When I haven't slept enough, I'm hugnry all day, no matter how much and how often I eat.
When I know I've eaten, it's OK to ingore hunger cues.
Does my stomach feel physically full and yet I'm feeling hunger?
Do I feel physically full when I imagine eating an applve vs a Snickers?

what_food_kind.heading: What did I eat?
what_food_kind.prompt: Did I have a full meal or just a snack?
notes: Sometimes I keep snacking instead of pausing for a proper meal.
Some meals don't keep me full for as long as others - pancakes or cereal fly through me.

take_break.heading: Could I take a break?
take_break.prompt: Can I try other ways to handle boredom, anxiety, diet rebellion?
notes: Am I thirsty? How will I feel after a glass of water?
I won't get fired for stepping away from my laptop for five minutes.
I have so many options! Quick stretch, walk around the office, make tea, hug Olsi, pet Rosie, do Kassandra's 5 minute yoga?
How will I feel physically if I have that sweet or snack just because I can?

have_snack.heading: Could I have a snack now?
have_snack.prompt: What are low glycemic index snacks to keep my blood sugar level steady?
notes: Am I at home, at work, outside? What are my choices?
Fresh fruit, nuts, digestive biscuits?
Milk, kefir, plain yogurt, cheese sticks?
Veggies with hummus?
Brick bread with peanut butter or avocado?
Jerky, tuna, boiled egg?

time_for_meal.heading: Could I have a meal now?
time_for_meal.prompt: Is it time to take a break and have lunch or dinner?
notes: It's OK to eat lunch less than 4 hours after breakfast.
I know I'll keep snacking until I have proper lunch.
I can have a dessert with my meal.

be_uncomfortable.heading: This might not be the best time to eat
be_uncomfortable.prompt: Am I willing to feel discomfort in this moment for my body's sake?
notes: I want my body to be healthy and lasting, whatever shape it is.
What do I need right now?
Rest? Movement? Comfort? Distraction?
What can I do to meet those needs or to distract myself from the discomfort?
